source_desc: Wherever your AI supports skills, VibeSkills works. 340+ governed skills spanning coding, research, automation & creative work.

### More than a skill collection — your **personal AI operating system** If your AI supports skills, VibeSkills works. 340+ skills spanning coding, research, data science & creative work.

source_desc: All-in-one terminal workspace — local shells, SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, AI agent, and file manager in a single native binary. Built with Tauri 2 and pure Rust SSH (no OpenSSL). Smart reconnect, MCP, RAG, plugins, 30+ themes, 11 languages.
A third-party Bitwarden server running on Cloudflare Workers
Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.
Your infinite canvas workspace for agents, tasks, knowledge, and research. An infinite canvas for Claude Code, Codex, terminals, tasks, and notes.
Fast computer automation CLI for AI agents. Control any desktop with screenshots, clicks, typing, scrolling, and more.
🕷️ An adaptive Web Scraping framework that handles everything from a single request to a full-scale crawl!
🎯 Goal-driven execution helper for long-running tasks and explicit success criteria
🧑‍🎨 A collection of Golang agentic skills that works
Supercharged Claude Code Official Telegram plugin — threading, voice messages 2 ways, stickers, GIFs, reactions, MarkdownV2 & more. Drop-in replacement.
The native version-control plugin for OpenClaw. Avoid rework and save tokens with easy checkpoints, rollbacks, and safe trial-and-error branching.
ClawLess — A serverless browser-based runtime for Claw AI Agents powered by WebContainers

SEOBuild Onpage - The first AI agent that writes pages Google ranks AND LLMs cite. One command in, ranking page out. Built on DeerFlow, powered by 2026 SEO + GEO strategies tested / working. Forensic competitive analysis, 500-token chunk architecture, entity consensus, verification tags. BYOK GSC, DataforSEO. Works w/ OpenClaw, Claude Code, Codex
A collection of 130+ specialized Codex subagents covering a wide range of development use cases.
Agent skill that generates Apple-inspired bento grid presentation cards. For Claude Code, Codex, and any AI coding agent.
"ClawTeam: Agent Swarm Intelligence" (One Command → Full Automation)
Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open
An RSS aggregator with AI-powered summarization and translation. Web UI + CLI for AI agents.
OpenClaw: Use All Major AI Models NO API Token! Claude/ChatGPT/Gemini/DeepSeek/Doubao/Grok/Qwen/Manus/Kimi
Dockhand - Docker management you will like.

OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.
RikkaHub is an Android APP that supports for multiple LLM providers.
The awesome collection of OpenClaw skills. 5,400+ skills filtered and categorized from the official OpenClaw Skills Registry.🦞
A modern GUI client based on Tauri, designed to run in Windows, macOS and Linux for tailored proxy experience
Expert-level WordPress knowledge for AI coding assistants - blocks, themes, plugins, and best practices
An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms
Another Web GUI for Rclone

Stop juggling AI accounts. Quotio is a beautiful native macOS menu bar app that unifies your Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Qwen, and Antigravity subscriptions – with real-time quota tracking and smart auto-failover for AI coding tools like Claude Code, OpenCode, and Droid.
Linux DO Credit Virtual Goods Shop

Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.
